creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2007-03-26 02:05:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/libspiff  Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.6.1rc1
  - A new version of libSpiff has been released. This release includes a C
    interface, next to the existing C++ bits. libSpiff now installs a shared
    object, using libtool.
  
  PR:             ports/110778
  Submitted by:   maintainer (Ed Schouten)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +4 -1      ports/multimedia/libspiff/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/multimedia/libspiff/distinfo
  1.2       +4 -0      ports/multimedia/libspiff/pkg-plist
